tree.name: Norman Powell
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: MIA sent Kyle Anderson and Kevin Love to UTA; LAC sent Norman Powell to MIA; LAC sent cash and 2027 2nd round pick (LAC own) to UTA; UTA sent John Collins to LAC. Utah also received a trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: Kyle Anderson
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Received from GSW in 5-team Jimmy Butler trade. Sent to UTA in Norman Powell 3-team trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Jimmy Butler
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 4-team sign-and-trade: PHI sent Jimmy Butler to MIA; MIA sent Josh Richardson to PHI, Hassan Whiteside to POR, and 2023 1st round pick to LAC; POR sent Meyers Leonard to MIA and Maurice Harkless to LAC; PHI sent Mathias Lessort to LAC; LAC sent cash to MIA.

assetsGivenUp.name: Josh Richardson
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 40th overall by MIA in 2015. Sent to PHI.

assetsGivenUp.name: Hassan Whiteside
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed by MIA Nov 2014. Sent to POR.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2023 1st Round Pick (#18, MIA own)
assetsGivenUp.note: MIA's own 2023 1st round pick, sent to LAC in the Jimmy Butler sign-and-trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Josh Richardson
assetsGivenUp.note: Re-signed as free agent July 2023. Sent to UTA.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2026 2nd Round Pick (LAL)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team sign-and-trade: MIA signed and traded Max Strus to CLE; CLE traded a 2026 2nd round pick (LAL own) to MIA; CLE traded Cedi Osman, Lamar Stevens, and a 2030 2nd round pick to SAS.
assetsGivenUp.note: LAL own pick, acquired from CLE. Sent to TOR in 5-team Butler trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Max Strus
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed by MIA Aug 2021. Signed-and-traded to CLE July 2023.

assetsGivenUp.name: Kevin Love
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as free agent July 6, 2024. Sent to UTA.
